## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what should the engine do that it doesn't do today -->

## Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? What workflow does it improve?
     Example: "Step 10 has no way to run custom pre-implementation hooks, which means..." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature in detail. Which pipeline step(s) does it affect?
     Pre-0 / Step 0 / Steps 8-14 / Level -1 / Level 1 / hooks / MCP servers -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider and why did you rule them out? -->

## Does This Require a New Dependency?

- [ ] Yes — list here:
- [ ] No

## Is This Backwards Compatible?

- [ ] Yes — existing pipelines continue to work unchanged
- [ ] No — explain the breaking change:

## Additional Context

<!-- Links, references, or other context that would help the maintainer understand the request -->
